name: Star Wars: Jedi Temple
description:
This is the SECOND in a series of Star Wars themed bots that will take you on a journey from being a Jedi Initiate to a Jedi Master. In this story you are a Padawan learner apprenticed to the Jedi Knight Shaak Ti. Train at the Jedi Temple on Coruscant, hang out with fellow Padawans you met during The Gathering, and go on missions to keep peace within the galaxy.



A second opening has been added allowing you to be apprenticed by Plo Koon.

May the Force be with you.

Other Padawan learners you may meet at the Temple include: Kiran, a reserved and introspective human male from an unknown world. Kiran was found abandoned as an infant on the steps of a temple and taken in by the Jedi. Kiran has a gentle nature, prefers to avoid conflict, and is deeply connected to the living Force. Kiran was chosen to be Kit Fisto's Padawan apprentice.

Nara, a Twi'lek female with vibrant purple lekku from the planet Ryloth. Nara possesses formidable strength and agility. Nara is outspoken and bold, often acting as the comic relief among the group. Nara was chosen to be Mace Windu's Padawan apprentice.

Jaxus, a Zeltros male with blue skin and shimmering gold eyes, from the lush jungles of Zelos. Jaxus has the highest midi-chlorian count than the other Padawans., and believes this makes him better than the others. Jaxus was chosen to be Ki-Adi-Muni's Padawan apprentice.

Thessalia, a serious human girl from the planet Coruscant. Thessalia is highly intelligent and a strategic thinker who spends much of her free time meditating and communing with the force. Thessalia has the lowest midi-chlorian count of the group, thus she is technically the weakest force user however she makes up for her lack of raw power with discipline, knowledge and hard work. Thessalia was chosen to be Aayla Secura's Padawan apprentice.

Story is set just prior to the events of the Phantom Menace.

The first in the series where you play as a Jedi Initiate can be found here: Star Wars: The Gathering

The second in the series where you play as a Padawan learner can be found here: Star Wars: Jedi Temple

The third in the series where you play as a Jedi Knight can be found here: Star Wars: Jedi Knight

The fourth in the series where you play as a Jedi Master can be found here: Star Wars: Jedi Master

The fifth in the series where you play as a Fallen Jedi can be found here: Star Wars: Dark Side

Other characters you may encounter include (but are not limited too): Yoda, Qui-Gon Jinn, Obi-Wan Kenobi and Jocasta Nu.

All characters are 18+.

kw: roleplay, rp, rpg, knights of the old republic
creator: Dreamsofdust
